channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump vows to 'take care of Cuba,' praises Venezuela cooperation at summit
item.description: Trump made the promise in front of an assembled meeting of Latin American leaders.
item.content:encoded:
Trump made the promise in front of an assembled meeting of Latin American leaders.

(Image credit: Rebecca Blackwell)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: British Columbia to make daylight saving time permanent
item.description: The Canadian province is permanently ending the biannual time shifts for more light at the day's end. But research shows daylight saving increases health risks.
item.content:encoded:
The Canadian province is permanently ending the biannual time shifts for more light at the day's end. But research shows daylight saving increases health risks.

(Image credit: Charles Krupa)
item.dc:creator: Rhitu Chatterjee

item.title: How the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran is realigning the politics of the Middle East
item.description: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with author and journalist Kim Ghattas about the impacts the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran will have on the broader region.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with author and journalist Kim Ghattas about the impacts the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran will have on the broader region.
item.dc:creator: Michael Levitt

item.title: Shedding light on how Epstein used visits to Interlochen to target girls
item.description: An NPR reporting team sheds new light on how Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell used their access to the Interlochen Center for the Arts to target girls.
item.content:encoded: An NPR reporting team sheds new light on how Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell used their access to the Interlochen Center for the Arts to target girls.
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: First HBCU D1 women's wrestlers compete at championship
item.description: It's a weekend of firsts in Iowa, where the first national women's college wrestling championship is taking place and the first HBCU Division 1 women's wrestling team is fielding players.
item.content:encoded: It's a weekend of firsts in Iowa, where the first national women's college wrestling championship is taking place and the first HBCU Division 1 women's wrestling team is fielding players.
item.dc:creator: Jason Fuller

item.title: Jan. 6 plaque honoring police officers is now displayed at the Capitol after a 3-year delay
item.description: Visitors to the Capitol in Washington now have a visible reminder of the siege there on Jan. 6, 2021, and the officers who fought and were injured that day.
item.content:encoded:
Visitors to the Capitol in Washington now have a visible reminder of the siege there on Jan. 6, 2021, and the officers who fought and were injured that day.

(Image credit: Allison Robbert)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Authorities searching debris after suspected tornadoes kill 6 in Michigan, Oklahoma
item.description: A 12-year-old boy is reported to be among the dead following powerful storms that stretched across the middle of the country.
item.content:encoded:
A 12-year-old boy is reported to be among the dead following powerful storms that stretched across the middle of the country.

(Image credit: Nam Y. Huh)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Opinion: The immorality of betting on war
item.description: Traders on prediction markets bet on nearly anything. One made more than half a million dollars betting on the U.S. strike against Iran. But should people wager on human suffering?
item.content:encoded:
Traders on prediction markets bet on nearly anything. One made more than half a million dollars betting on the U.S. strike against Iran. But should people wager on human suffering?

(Image credit: Scott Olson)
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: Native Americans react to Sen. Markwayne Mullin's DHS appointment
item.description: Many tribes are encouraged by Trump's choice of Sen. Markwayne Mullin, a member of the Cherokee nation, as the new DHS Secretary. ICE agents have been accused of racially profiling Native Americans.
item.content:encoded: Many tribes are encouraged by Trump's choice of Sen. Markwayne Mullin, a member of the Cherokee nation, as the new DHS Secretary. ICE agents have been accused of racially profiling Native Americans.
item.dc:creator: Eric Westervelt

item.title: European leaders' views on the developing war in the Middle East
item.description: Europeans are divided over how to respond to the US/Israel war with Iran. German leaders have been measured, while Spain's prime minister has been critical of the Trump Administration and of Israel.
item.content:encoded: Europeans are divided over how to respond to the US/Israel war with Iran. German leaders have been measured, while Spain's prime minister has been critical of the Trump Administration and of Israel.
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz
